interactables.name: Broken Cart
interactables.text: A merchant's cart, wheels smashed and axle snapped. Goods are scattered across the road — bolts of cloth, smashed pottery, a child's toy trampled in the mud. This wasn't an accident. Someone wanted this cart stopped.

interactables.name: Ironmarch Camp Banner
interactables.text: The iron fist sigil of the Ironmarch Legion, planted in the earth like a territorial marker. The fabric is new — this camp was established recently. Below the fist, words are stitched: 'ORDER THROUGH STRENGTH.'
interactables.state_alt_text: Captain Draven's personal standard flies beside the Legion banner now. The camp has grown. More tents, more soldiers. The ultimatum is coming.

interactables.name: Crossroads Sign
interactables.text:
A weathered signpost, arms pointing in four directions:
← ASHVALE VILLAGE (2 leagues)
→ THE WIDER WORLD (road blocked)
↑ THORNWOOD EDGE
↓ SOUTHERN MARSHES (impassable)

interactables.name: Abandoned Campfire
interactables.text: Cold ashes and charred stones. Someone camped here recently — a trader, perhaps, who never made it to Ashvale.

interactables.name: Torn Map
interactables.text: A scrap of military parchment, half-buried in mud. It shows Legion troop movements — arrows converging on Ashvale from three directions. Someone has written in red ink: 'Phase 2: Secure trade route. Phase 3: Present terms.'
